events.label: tool result
events.text: File created successfully at: /app/answer.json (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessed the scenario as a critical HV safety sequence violation — pulling the service disconnect without observing the OEM discharge wait time or performing a verify-absence-of-voltage check means the system was never confirmed to be in an electrically safe work condition. Result written to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `risk: critical`, the correct de-energization sequence, and required corrective actions (wait discharge time, VAV with rated meter, ground if required, second-person verification) before HV work resumes.
